_description: DM-R-12 — agent-level ownership registry. Agents declare themselves via the `Agent-Id:` commit trailer; the DM-R-12 checker (scripts/check-agent-ownership.cjs) rejects PRs where a declared agent touches paths owned by another agent. CODEOWNERS gates humans at file level; this gates agents at commit level.
_policy: An entry 'owns' a minimatch-style glob. A path with multiple matching entries belongs to the LAST-declared owner (most specific). Paths with zero matches are un-owned — any agent may modify. Register a new agent BEFORE that agent makes its first commit.
_how_to_use: Every agent run that commits to this repo MUST append a `Agent-Id: <id>` trailer to its commit messages (e.g., `git commit -m "...\n\nAgent-Id: claude-code"`). Missing trailer = treated as a human commit (check-agent-ownership passes).

claude-code.description: Primary DM (data-model) programme + DM-R resilience hardening agent. Owns schema, migrations, resilience tooling, publicId layer, planning docs.
